name: Barranco Gold Mining Corp.
description: Barranco Gold Mining Corp. is a Vancouver-based junior explorer advancing the King Gold Project, a 3,456-hectare property situated in the Spences Bridge Gold Belt approximately 50 km south of Merritt, British Columbia. The King Property is prospective for low-sulphidation epithermal gold-quartz veins, and initial exploration programs have identified multiple gold and copper anomalies. The company is at the early exploration stage, systematically testing the property for economic mineralization.
